settings.description:
A defining landmark within the Cotino community, The Parr House expresses Mid-Century Modern design through its honest use of glass, steel, and stone. With floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking Cotino Bay, the space blurs the line between interior and landscape, a true reflection of modern desert living.
For this architectural statement, Creative Mines developed a custom profile inspired by the natural stone formations of Frank Lloyd Wright’s Fallingwater, infusing the structure with texture, warmth, and a handcrafted authenticity that complements its sleek geometry.
